## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated and all passing (`pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Code formatted (`black naijaeval/` and `ruff check naijaeval/`)
- [ ] New metric has a docstring with: formal definition, `higher_is_better`, example usage
- [ ] New dataset has a docstring with: citation, license, column description
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] No new dependencies without discussion in the issue first
